seoTitle: Corlette vs Corney Town — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Corlette and Corney Town. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Corlette vs Corney Town: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Corlette and Corney Town.
heading: Corlette vs Corney Town — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Corlette, New South Wales and Corney Town, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Corney Town has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Corlette (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Corlette or Corney Town safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Corlette has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Corney Town scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Corlette scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Corney Town scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Corlette or Corney Town?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Corney Town has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
